textByHash.75e37ef4864d714cabcc62a726a10169aa0a1e14: So! I did hear from Herr Caranos that you were to our Colony coming. The Director in his office is waiting for you.
textByHash.5803653facf42208a7afabc6be1091c820519a9d: No way can I send items to bank for you with great big trolls outside! You save Colony, then Arnold open bank for you.
textByHash.432e33ea99d8d2b07113911108aac81df5cce1d7: I not have spare stuff to trade with you now. Maybe we trade after you save Colony, ja?
textByHash.3bc97ab4603db6b49920607bb30ad75ad93519e9: No way can I let you collect stuffsies with great big trolls outside! You save Colony, then Arnold help you.
textByHash.fa8a2e9832cf9ad8185388f4f71dab572399cae6: That thing broken. Arnold fix it when Colony all safe.
textByHash.3554217a46b0be7b4f00d616372305ea3c37ce6b: You come to speak to me?
textByHash.4f4f19c86e4b87aa8b0cef8b1a77066fe38fea10: Ah, that is good. I the storemaster am for this Piscatoris Fishing Colony, and our stores are - ahah - not so good. Indeed, our stores contain not a bit of food!
textByHash.1a1e33a0cdc828b35fe3f75a25888d9702293616: This a catastrophe may become, as difficult it may be to fish while the trolls outside are waiting, and our bellies soon shall rumble loudly!
textByHash.0a7d6abb835993652c566923fcef9a41a1b3195e: But now you come here to help Arnold! A good and sturdy warrior you must be indeed to have entered our Colony in these times! So you can the fishing do for us!
textByHash.76d7f44f09ce83095f1eeed95c2092f6ec66745e: Ja, this is so. But the fish must then be stored, or stinking rotten they become! So the fish you bring must be shiny fresh!
textByHash.987bdc03316d46d1dfb1b2002ad9e6b67340a729: The monkfish in these waters swim, this is why Herr Caranos build his Colony here.
textByHash.883fb1d36c2f8dc30cf9942e729f9ac73da86013: You go catch 5 fresh monkfish from sea over in north- west corner. If you bring stinking old monkfish, Arnold know about it, and Arnold not take them!
textByHash.6f2a07767c444b8224d67c8cc8ae925f72a56789: Big thanks. When Colony safe, Herman reward you good.
textByHash.34c9fb393f4289b0775cb77785b2a1a36e258a5a: Well, you go to sea at north-west corner of Colony and catch nice fresh monkfish for Arnold, ja?
textByHash.0782f1e3147f804743827d5666c347f9db1f88fd: That not monkfish! Go to sea at north-west corner of Colony and catch MONKFISH!
textByHash.c5bb72631556f6f5d69ab3424038cc3867c566ec: This? This fresh, but it no good to me raw! You go use range in kitchen!
textByHash.aecff5f5b67699f1a43b4deb18ede143b75c097e: Ah, lovely fresh monkfish straight from the sea! Now you bring me more, ja?
textByHash.b9203e1d894d68b82d9cb6d5592695898eac2d06: This is superb! Now I store these carefully, and you go help little Frankie.
textByHash.dcc7c9dad4cfc5fa3b5dab3f9287ef523436e5a9: This is superb! Now I store these carefully, and you go tell Herr Caranos.
textByHash.93f748c358d39bfda78204812f3cf992db78441d: Your fresh monkfish superb! But now you go help little Frankie, ja?
textByHash.1101e6854591312ba94cfb9e550d9a37dde7254f: Now you done helping me and Frankie, you go see what Herr Caranos want next.
textByHash.eb455791cfd26a9cc8e4e63b07ca9560ba7d326d: It good to see you, , but many things I have to do with lovely fresh monkfish you bring me earlier.
textByHash.76c51c2707f1261a241fac916d6270a509aeb2da: I hear you fetch mighty army for us!
textByHash.a7a24735f7aa0afc74618ce9e8a9c4964045cd12: You go take them to Herr Caranos quickly!
textByHash.6be500d286f320fcf4c34683db84c2ba654e90cf: You kick big troll queenie pretty hard, ja?
textByHash.434fa3238dca28d38346fb9d75548dde362fa17b: Piscatoris Colony owe you big-time for your help. You go see Hermie - maybe he got something for you.
textByHash.a1a6be7f785a8fee765f8767bf46099d8088f297: Herr Herman Caranos. I call him 'Hermie' when him not listening. Sometimes I call him worse things, but not today.
textByHash.0d373bd7d7912d56ad72db37f883e871c4ce47d6: Ah, you come back! What you want from Arnold, heh?
textByHash.53c5a337bd8291f522f84647c3c45db00f54a7c6: Ja, I have wide range of stock...
textByHash.f447fe1c52121da579be3ba82a0147a68a6dc38e: Ah, that is nice - always I like to chat, but Herr Caranos tell me to get back to work! Here, you been nice, so have a present:
textByHash.c14b15c85493a3bec4f4065b557febe41bcff7cc: Ja, cabbage is good for you!
textByHash.226216ca5b12764e79d4a1d7dc56a99eeb120192: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
textByHash.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
